entry.message: [info] Activation of plug-in DQC Rules Validator successful, version Check version using Tools->DQC->Version on the GUI or --dqc-version on the command line. - validate/DQC
[info] Activation of plug-in SEC Inline Transforms successful, version 19.2. - EDGAR/transform
[info] Activation of plug-in Inline XBRL Document Set successful, version 1.1. - inlineXbrlDocumentSet

[DQC.US.0123.9583] The company has reported a value for us-gaap:StockholdersEquity with the axis StatementClassOfStockAxis with a value of 3 to represent the monetary value of the class of stock in equity. This fact however when used in the Statement of Shareholders Equity must include the Component of Equity and associated member indicating if it is preferred stock, common stock or treasury stock. This error could occur because the filer has either 1) used the incorrect element or 2) has NOT included the Statement Equity Components Axis with the Common Stock or Preferred Stock member on the fact.
The filer should either add the Statement Equity Components Axis and respective stock member in addition to the class of stock axis to the fact, or change the element name from us-gaap:StockholdersEquity to the appropriate element if the value is not included in Stockholders Equity.
Element : us-gaap:StockholdersEquity Period : 2023-12-31 Dimensions : us-gaap:StatementClassOfStockAxis=us-gaap:SeriesBPreferredStockMember
Rule Element Id:9583 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - cnfn-20251231_10k.htm 3007

property.name: label
property.value: Equity, Attributable to Parent, Beginning Balance

entry.message:
[DQC.US.0123.9583] The company has reported a value for us-gaap:StockholdersEquityIncludingPortionAttributableToNoncontrollingInterest with the axis StatementClassOfStockAxis with a value of 1 to represent the monetary value of the class of stock in equity. This fact however when used in the Statement of Shareholders Equity must include the Component of Equity and associated member indicating if it is preferred stock, common stock or treasury stock. This error could occur because the filer has either 1) used the incorrect element or 2) has NOT included the Statement Equity Components Axis with the Common Stock or Preferred Stock member on the fact.
The filer should either add the Statement Equity Components Axis and respective stock member in addition to the class of stock axis to the fact, or change the element name from us-gaap:StockholdersEquityIncludingPortionAttributableToNoncontrollingInterest to the appropriate element if the value is not included in Stockholders Equity.
Element : us-gaap:StockholdersEquityIncludingPortionAttributableToNoncontrollingInterest Period : 2025-12-31 Dimensions : us-gaap:StatementClassOfStockAxis=us-gaap:SeriesAPreferredStockMember
Rule Element Id:9583 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - cnfn-20251231_10k.htm 3245

[DQC.US.0123.9583] The company has reported a value for us-gaap:StockholdersEquityIncludingPortionAttributableToNoncontrollingInterest with the axis StatementClassOfStockAxis with a value of 1 to represent the monetary value of the class of stock in equity. This fact however when used in the Statement of Shareholders Equity must include the Component of Equity and associated member indicating if it is preferred stock, common stock or treasury stock. This error could occur because the filer has either 1) used the incorrect element or 2) has NOT included the Statement Equity Components Axis with the Common Stock or Preferred Stock member on the fact.
The filer should either add the Statement Equity Components Axis and respective stock member in addition to the class of stock axis to the fact, or change the element name from us-gaap:StockholdersEquityIncludingPortionAttributableToNoncontrollingInterest to the appropriate element if the value is not included in Stockholders Equity.
Element : us-gaap:StockholdersEquityIncludingPortionAttributableToNoncontrollingInterest Period : 2024-12-31 Dimensions : us-gaap:StatementClassOfStockAxis=us-gaap:SeriesAPreferredStockMember
Rule Element Id:9583 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - cnfn-20251231_10k.htm 3091

[DQC.US.0123.9583] The company has reported a value for us-gaap:StockholdersEquity with the axis StatementClassOfStockAxis with a value of 1 to represent the monetary value of the class of stock in equity. This fact however when used in the Statement of Shareholders Equity must include the Component of Equity and associated member indicating if it is preferred stock, common stock or treasury stock. This error could occur because the filer has either 1) used the incorrect element or 2) has NOT included the Statement Equity Components Axis with the Common Stock or Preferred Stock member on the fact.
The filer should either add the Statement Equity Components Axis and respective stock member in addition to the class of stock axis to the fact, or change the element name from us-gaap:StockholdersEquity to the appropriate element if the value is not included in Stockholders Equity.
Element : us-gaap:StockholdersEquity Period : 2023-12-31 Dimensions : us-gaap:StatementClassOfStockAxis=us-gaap:SeriesAPreferredStockMember

property.value: Equity, Attributable to Parent, Beginning Balance

entry.message:
[DQC.US.0123.9583] The company has reported a value for us-gaap:StockholdersEquityIncludingPortionAttributableToNoncontrollingInterest with the axis StatementClassOfStockAxis with a value of 3 to represent the monetary value of the class of stock in equity. This fact however when used in the Statement of Shareholders Equity must include the Component of Equity and associated member indicating if it is preferred stock, common stock or treasury stock. This error could occur because the filer has either 1) used the incorrect element or 2) has NOT included the Statement Equity Components Axis with the Common Stock or Preferred Stock member on the fact.
The filer should either add the Statement Equity Components Axis and respective stock member in addition to the class of stock axis to the fact, or change the element name from us-gaap:StockholdersEquityIncludingPortionAttributableToNoncontrollingInterest to the appropriate element if the value is not included in Stockholders Equity.
Element : us-gaap:StockholdersEquityIncludingPortionAttributableToNoncontrollingInterest Period : 2025-12-31 Dimensions : us-gaap:StatementClassOfStockAxis=us-gaap:SeriesBPreferredStockMember
Rule Element Id:9583 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - cnfn-20251231_10k.htm 3249

[DQC.US.0123.9583] The company has reported a value for us-gaap:StockholdersEquityIncludingPortionAttributableToNoncontrollingInterest with the axis StatementClassOfStockAxis with a value of 3 to represent the monetary value of the class of stock in equity. This fact however when used in the Statement of Shareholders Equity must include the Component of Equity and associated member indicating if it is preferred stock, common stock or treasury stock. This error could occur because the filer has either 1) used the incorrect element or 2) has NOT included the Statement Equity Components Axis with the Common Stock or Preferred Stock member on the fact.
The filer should either add the Statement Equity Components Axis and respective stock member in addition to the class of stock axis to the fact, or change the element name from us-gaap:StockholdersEquityIncludingPortionAttributableToNoncontrollingInterest to the appropriate element if the value is not included in Stockholders Equity.
Element : us-gaap:StockholdersEquityIncludingPortionAttributableToNoncontrollingInterest Period : 2024-12-31 Dimensions : us-gaap:StatementClassOfStockAxis=us-gaap:SeriesBPreferredStockMember
